name: Quick Strawberry Trifle
recipeIngredient: 2 pints Fresh strawberries, stemmed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold 1/8 cup sugar into sliced berries; set aside.
2. Beat the remaining 1/8 cup sugar into cream cheese.
3. Whip cream until stiff peaks form; then fold cream cheese into cream.
4. Cut cake into slices about 1/3 inch thick.
5. Arrange a layer of slices in the bottom of a glass bowl, sprinkle with a teaspoon of sherry and spread with melted jelly.
6. Put in a layer of strawberries and a layer of cream.
7. Continue layering, ending with a layer of cream.
8. Garnish with a whole berry.
